subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Us unto him who hath attained to the recognition of his Lord, when the veil was rent asunder and the Promised One appeared with manifest sovereignty. Say [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن فاز بعرفان ربه اذ کشف الغطاء و ظهر الموعود بسلطان مبین قل
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
